reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Spec deviation confirmed: validateDataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest lacks MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS validation (TODO at line 134). An attacker can trigger this via P2P DataColumnSidecarsByRange request with out-of-range startSlot, causing unnecessary DB/archive queries. However, impact is limited to resource waste on individual responder nodes rather than network-scale disruption (does not meet Medium threshold of >5% network impact). Downgraded from Medium to Low.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: EIP-7594 PeerDAS: data_column_sidecars_by_range must reject requests outside serve_range window
